name: Contrivance Technology
notes: We Are Internet Service Provider In Bangladesh. Domestic Network under covering whole Dinajpur BD. Engaged in the fiber optic infrastructure for Broadband network, Contrivance Technology is positioned to be one of the largest network access provider in BD. Contrivance Technology is supported by professionals and experts who have experiences more than 02 years in the industry. We also have experiences to serve various client segmentation such as NGO, Corporate, Government and other industries.
